It is time to pass the SAVE America Act. We must ensure that American elections are safe and secure.

Happy Fourth of July, and God Bless America! https://t.co/p8AxaSE19M

His life of service to our state will live on in our memories and through his many contributions, like the Georgia National Fairgrounds. 

Go rest high on that mountain, Larry.

Vivien and I will be praying for Abraham, and your family, as you take on this battle.
WELL DONE, WELCOME HOME https://t.co/lF6NjOi09l

The A-10 Warthog has served faithfully for 50 years, and will do so until at least 2030. I am proud to have led an amendment halting plans to retire the entire A-10 fleet this year & am glad to see this extension. Our A-10s will continue providing support for our warriors.
Happy Birthday to the US Air Force Reserve and the almost 70,000 reservists that represent some of the best America has to offer.

"The angel said to the women, “Do not be afraid, for I know that you are looking for Jesus, who was crucified. He is not https://t.co/pp8zW1jAIY

May you all enjoy a blessed Good Friday. https://t.co/tZEFNLCvDP

He is an asset to our country, always putting service before self. I thank him for his years of

We are hopeful for a successful mission & a safe journey home. 🇺🇸

We will deeply miss his service to our country and his leadership on the House Agriculture Committee. Go rest high on that mountain, my friend.

2 Corinthians 9:15: “Thanks be to God for His indescribable gift!”

The Lord God gave us the greatest gift, His son Jesus Christ. He dwelt among us so that we may be cleansed of our sin and be with Him forever in eternal paradise. Merry Christmas everyone! https://t.co/WqGxfOISiG

Congratulations to #GA08’s own Worth County Rams for winning the GHSA Class 1A Division 1 state championship!

Trailing 13-10 at halftime, the Rams rallied for a comeback victory over the defending champs, Toombs County, for their first state title since 1987!

It’s harvest season in Georgia and President Trump is making sure our farmers have what they need.

Meanwhile, Georgia’s senators have voted 11 times to turn their back on them.
Republicans are voting to fund the government and Georgia’s senator is exploiting it for political points.

Georgia’s farmers — and farmers across the country — need our senators to vote to reopen the government.

Our growers and producers support us every day. Our senators can return that support by voting “yes” on the clean CR. https://t.co/4z3vBOTgZ9

Not only are Georgia’s senators endangering the livelihoods of the people they represent, they are also risking the safety of the country.

House Republicans have passed the CR to fund the government. It’s time for Senate Democrats to do the same.

Georgia’s senators continue to vote with New York’s Chuck Schumer, while ignoring Georgia’s farmers.

It’s past time for our senators to end this shutdown and support our growers and producers at home.

We will continue to strengthen and support the US-Israel relationship.
